title: Ethereal Bloom
description: A luminous exploration of colour and movement, this piece captures the fleeting beauty of nature in transition.

title: Midnight Current
description: Deep indigos and flowing forms evoke the quiet power of water under moonlight.

title: Golden Passage
description: Rich golds and earthy tones create a sense of warmth and journey through layered textures.

title: Still Waters
description: Soft blues and gentle brushwork reflect the calm of a still morning.

title: Ember & Ash
description: Fiery oranges and smoky greys collide in this dynamic abstract piece.

title: Soft Terrain
description: Muted pastels and organic shapes suggest a landscape seen through the haze of memory.
